service.name: Open-Meteo API
service.description_for_ai: Free weather forecast API. No API key needed. Hourly and daily forecasts, historical weather, 16-day forecast. 11km resolution globally. Covers temperature, precipitation, wind, UV index, cloud cover. Best free weather API.

auth.cost: Free for non-commercial. Commercial from 10 EUR/month

capabilities.description_for_ai: Free weather forecast API. No API key needed. Hourly and daily forecasts, historical weather, 16-day forecast. 11km resolution globally. Covers temperature, precipitation, wind, UV index, cloud cover. Best free weather API. Get weather forecast for any coordinates. Temperature, precipitation, wind, humidity. Up to 16 days. No API key needed.

hourly.description: Comma-separated: temperature_2m, precipitation, wind_speed_10m, relative_humidity_2m, uv_index

agent_hints.free: No API key, no registration. Best free weather API in 2026.
agent_hints.coordinates: Use Nominatim or Google Maps to convert city name to lat/lon first.
